data.title: Ethereum and Keyring Network debut innovative legal defense fund for privacy devs, merging DeFi lending with legal aid.
data.description: Ethereum, along with Keyring Network, has introduced an innovative funding approach to assist privacy-centric developers with legal defense by merging DeFi lending with legal safeguards. This initiative aims to provide financial support for legal matters to developers who prioritize privacy in their projects. The collaboration between Ethereum and Keyring Network signals a significant step towards enhancing the protection and empowerment of developers in the crypto space. This new mechanism is designed to offer a robust financial foundation for legal cases, ensuring that privacy-focused developers have the resources necessary to defend their work effectively. Overall, this development showcases a commitment to supporting privacy-driven innovation in the crypto sector.

data.title: Cadence Giving Foundation pledges multi-year commitment to expand AI Hub at San José State University.
data.description: In San Jose, California, the Cadence Giving Foundation has revealed a long-term pledge to enhance the AI Hub at San Jose State University (SJSU).

data.title: Nord Anglia US schools ranked top 0.5-2% nationally in Niche's 2026 Best Private K-12 Rankings.
data.description: Nord Anglia Education schools in the United States have been recognized as top-performing private schools on a national scale. The schools have achieved rankings in the top 0.5 to 2% in the country, as per the 2026 Niche Best K-12 Schools in America rankings. This acknowledgment demonstrates Nord Anglia's commitment to providing high-quality education.
Maxima Group secures €260M loan from SEB and ING banks to repay bonds.

data.title: Vidle Housing partners with BetterHelp on World Mental Health Day to bolster mental health for healthcare pros.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on October 10, 2025, Vidle Housing revealed a significant collaboration on World Mental Health Day. The partnership with BetterHelp, a leading virtual therapy provider, aims to enhance the mental health support for traveling healthcare professionals. This initiative demonstrates a commitment to bolstering mental well-being and providing resources to a wide network of caregivers.

data.title: Solana is boosting its corporate crypto funds, with its SOL treasury companies driving growth post-FTX incident.
data.description: Solana's corporate narrative has recently seen significant developments, from the aftermath of the FTX incident to an expansion inspired by Metaplanet. The SOL treasury companies play a crucial role in this full-circle journey, as Solana continues to navigate through these various milestones and with its growing presence in the market.

data.title: Aptorum Group Limited to offer $6 million - $2 million upfront and potential of $4 million from warrants exercise.
data.description: An initial $2 million has been paid, with the potential for an additional $4 million in gross proceeds upon full exercise of warrants.

data.title: ASP Isotopes Inc. plans Investor Access Event in South Africa on Nov 11-13, 2025. Limited slots left for investors.
data.description: A few spots are still open for institutional investors to attend the upcoming Investor Access Event that was previously announced. Interested parties should act quickly as there are only a limited number of seats left.

data.title: ZimVie stockholders approve acquisition by ARCHIMED in special meeting, highlighted on October 10, 2025.
data.description: ZimVie Inc., a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ZIMV, revealed today in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on October 10, 2025, that their stockholders have voted in favor of the acquisition of ZimVie by an affiliate of ARCHIMED. The special meeting of ZimVie stockholders resulted in the approval of the merger, outlined in the Agreement and Plan of Merger dated July 20, 2025. The acquisition marks a significant development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Amber Grid and EEX transfer GET Baltic's operations after a tender, completing process in 2023.
data.description: EEX and Amber Grid, Lithuania’s gas transmission system operator, have successfully concluded a strategic process initiated in 2023 to transfer ownership of GET Baltic's shares to the winning bidder of an international public tender. This move marks a key development in energy exchange, with important implications for the industry.

data.title: TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings priced $3 million direct offering of 2 million shares & warrants for additional 4 million shares at $1.50 per share.
data.description: BEIJING, October 10, 2025 - TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: TIRX) disclosed a recent securities purchase agreement with select institutional investors. The deal involves the sale of 2,000,000 Class A ordinary shares and warrants for the potential purchase of an additional 4,000,000 Class A ordinary shares at a combined rate of $1.50 per share, alongside warrants. This transaction is part of a registered direct offering, generating around $3 million in gross proceeds, exclusive of fees and other expenses. The warrants, each with an exercise price matching $1.50 per share, will be immediately exercisable upon issue and hold a five-year expiration period from the first exercise date. Closure of the offering is anticipated around October 14, 2025, dependent on meeting standard closing prerequisites.

data.title: SB Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBFG) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct. 30, with related conference call on Oct. 31 at 11:00 a.m. EDT.
data.description: In DEFIANCE, Ohio, SB Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBFG), a financial services company offering community banking, mortgage banking, wealth management, private client, and title insurance services, plans to announce its Q3 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025, post-market closure. An earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for October 31, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. EDT. Stay tuned for insights into the company's performance and future outlook.

data.title: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK) granted 180-day extension by Nasdaq to regain compliance with bid price rule.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on October 10, 2025, WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK), a prominent medical device supplier in China, revealed that its subsidiary, Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd., along with other branches in China, has been granted an extension of 180 days by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. This extension is to allow the Company time to meet the minimum bid price requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This development signifies Nasdaq's willingness to provide WORK Medical with an opportunity to regain compliance within the specified timeframe.

data.title: Callan JMB INC. (NASDAQ: CJMB) to participate in LD Micro Main Event XIX conference on October 19-21, 2025 in Texas.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, in Spring Branch, Texas, Callan JMB INC. (NASDAQ: CJMB), a company specializing in integrative logistics for the healthcare industry and emergency management agencies, revealed plans for their management team to engage in the LD Micro Main Event XIX Conference from October 19-21, 2025. Callan JMB offers various services such as fulfillment, storage, monitoring, and cold chain logistics to enhance operational efficiency. This conference presents an opportunity for the company to showcase its capabilities to a wider audience.

data.title: Super League partners with ES3 for branded gamified content on TV platforms. Exciting news for fans!
data.description: The Super League has recently disclosed a new exclusive partnership with ES3 to provide branded gamified content experiences across connected TV and pay TV platforms. This collaboration aims to enhance viewer engagement through interactive and immersive content. With this partnership, the Super League anticipates a significant increase in audience participation and loyalty. The partnership signifies a strategic move by the Super League to tap into the growing trend of gamified entertainment, especially as more people shift towards digital platforms for their viewing experiences. This collaboration is expected to reach a wide audience of nearly [X] million viewers across various platforms, offering them a unique and engaging way to interact with the Super League content. Overall, this partnership marks a milestone in the league's efforts to innovate and connect with fans in a more interactive and dynamic manner.

data.title: Charging Robotics' Revoltz sold 30 PORTO EV units in Israel, boosting urban logistics with electric micro-vehicles.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on October 10, 2025, Charging Robotics Inc. (stock symbol: OTC: CHEV) revealed that its subsidiary, Revoltz Ltd. (majority-owned by Charging Robotics at 52.73%), has achieved a significant feat by selling 30 PORTO EV units to clients across Israel. This accomplishment underscores the increasing acceptance of Revoltz's electric micro-vehicles tailored for effective last-mile transportation and urban logistics.

data.title: Nanoprecise partners with AccuKnox to boost cloud security with Zero Trust approach. Stronger compliance framework.
data.description: A California-based company, AccuKnox, known for its expertise in Zero Trust Cloud Native Application Protection Platforms (CNAPP), has recently revealed that Nanoprecise has opted for their services to bolster its cloud security, governance, and compliance structure. Nanoprecise, a prominent company in the industry, made this decision to further strengthen its security measures.
TD COWEN RAISES INTEL PRICE TARGET TO $35 FROM $20

data.title: Zcash surges 223% in Oct to $240, breaking 3-year downtrend, compared to BTC's 6-figure valuation. "Encrypted Bitcoin" narrative driving investor interest.
data.description: Zcash, a cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: ZEC), has surged by 223% throughout October, climbing from $74 to $240. This increase comes after the breaking of a three-year downtrend, reigniting investor interest in the narrative of it being an "encrypted Bitcoin." The comparison between Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) high valuation and ZEC's current value below $250 has been highlighted on social media. Zcash distinguishes itself by providing a higher level of privacy in its technology while still maintaining decentralized verification. This unique combination has attracted investors seeking long-term investment opportunities. The resurgence of the "encrypted Bitcoin" narrative has placed Zcash back into discussions within the market after a period of limited attention. Technical analysis shows that Zcash overcame a descending resistance line on the weekly chart, signaling the end of nearly three years of consolidation.
